rent.note: furnished 1BR city centre; avg ~15,000 MKD (~$240–$350); $330 midpoint

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; low utility costs

groceries.note: home cooking; North Macedonia cheap for food

transit.note: city bus monthly pass; reasonable network

coworking.note: limited but growing; cafe work common; ~$120 estimate

simData.note: Macedonian SIM; T-Mobile or A1; cheap plans

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Inland Balkans capital; mild seasonality.

evidence.quote: Rent for a one-bedroom apartment in the city center averages around 15,000 MKD (€240) per month. A single person can live comfortably in Skopje for $600 to $1,000 per month
A single person costs $801 per month, while the cost of living in Skopje is $1142 per month for digital nomads

evidence.claim: North Macedonia DNV requires proof of €1,500/mo income; 10% flat tax
evidence.quote: The country introduced a digital nomad visa pathway requiring proof of €1,500 monthly income

evidence.claim: comfortable single-person budget starts €600–800/mo across North Macedonia
evidence.quote: a comfortable single-person budget starts at just €600–800 per month across North Macedonia
